title: dalbergia henryana
intro: Dalbergia henryana, also known as the Hong Kong rosewood or Chinese rosewood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. In traditional medicine, Dalbergia henryana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves.
